title: Millet Flour Market to Reach USD 12.3 Billion by 2036 Amid Rising Demand for Gluten-Free and Ancient Grain Nutrition
description: The global millet flour market is transitioning from a traditional grain-processing segment into a mainstream gluten-free flour category as consumers increasingly seek nutritious alternatives to conventional wheat-based products. title: Five Ancient Greek Temples Turned Into Churches
